revision.text:
{{interconnected template|[[Template:Expand language/howto/newtopic|Expand language/howto/newtopic]]|[[Template:Expand language/doc|Expand language/doc]]|and about 200 language expand templates|page=template doc helper page}}{{#ifeq:{{#invoke:High-use|num|x|demo={{ROOTPAGENAME}}}}|many||{{High-use|demo={{ROOTPAGENAME}}}}}} {{transclusionless}} This template may be used to mark articles that have counterparts in {{{1}}} Wikipedia that are better than in English Wikipedia. These articles may be improved by [[Wikipedia:Translation|translating content]] from the original {{{1}}}. == Usage == To mark an article, tag it with :{{Expand {{{1}}}|''{{{2|{{{1}}}}}} article title''|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} This template adds articles to the category [[:Category:Articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia]]. See [[#Categorization]] below. The template should be placed atop the article page [[MOS:ORDER|along with other maintenance templates]]. == Parameters == All parameters are optional: * {{!}}1=''ARTICLE''{{snd}}title of the article on {{{1}}} Wikipedia. This defaults to the article linked to the English article via Wikidata. * |section=yes{{snd}}changes notice to "This section may be expanded..." (default: 'article'){{#ifexist: Category:Featured articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia | * |fa=yes{{snd}}used to tag articles that are [[WP:FA|featured articles]] in {{{1}}}; used in category name generation.}} {{#ifexist: Category:Geography articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia | * {{!}}topic=''TOPIC''{{snd}}a topic code used in category name generation.}} * {{!}}date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}{{snd}} set by bot if omitted. == Topics and categorization == This template categorizes articles into categories. Basic categorization is into: ⟶ [[:Category:Articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia]]. Usage of parameters fa and topic define subcategories{{#ifexist: Category:Featured articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia | , as follows: * fa=yes ⟶ [[:Category:Featured articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia]] |.}} {{#ifexist: Category:Geography articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia | Topic codes are expanded into fuller descriptors in the category name; for example: code ''geo'' becomes ''Geography'', and code ''gov'' becomes ''Government and politics''. * topic=geo ⟶ [[:Category:Geography articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia]] Topics recognized by {{BASEPAGENAME}} and the categories they are associated with include: {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|bio}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|culture}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|geo}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|gov}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|hist}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|mil}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|scitech}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|sport}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|struct}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|transp}} {{#ifexist: Template:Expand {{{1}}}/topics | {{Expand {{{1}}}/topics}} |}}
Topic code Topic name
and category		 Articles in
category
  [[:Category:Articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia|Main category]] {{#ifeq: {{PAGESINCATEGORY:Articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|subcats}} | 0 | | ({{PAGESINCATEGORY:Articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|subcats}} C) |}}{{PAGESINCATEGORY:Articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|pages}}
}} === Adding a new topic and subcategory === {{Collapse top|bg=cornsilk|click show to view details on adding new topics and subcategories}} {{Expand language/howto/newtopic|{{{1}}}}} {{Collapse bottom}} == See also == * [[WP:CWW]], policy which governs copying and translating articles from other language Wikipedias * [[WP:TFOLWP]], describes [[WP:COPYRIGHT|required attribution]] when adding translated content to an article * [[Wikipedia:Translation]], general info * [[Help:Translation]], a how-to page about how to copy and translate text from a [[Wikipedia:About#Other_languages|Wikipedia foreign language article]] into English. * [[Wikipedia:Pages needing translation into English]] * {{Template link|Expand language}}, parent template * {{Template link|Translated page}}, may be added to the Talk page to provide supplemental [[WP:TFOLWP|translation attribution]] * {{Template link|Proofreader needed}}, may be added to the article page to request assistance after translation from a given language * [https://randomincategory.toolforge.org/Articles_needing_translation_from_{{{1|German}}}_Wikipedia?site=en.wikipedia.org Random article needing expansion from {{{1|German}}} Wikipedia] * [[:Category:Articles needing translation from {{{1|German}}} Wikipedia]] * [[:Category:Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation from {{{1|German}}}]] * [[:Category:Wikipedia translation templates]] * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Intertranswiki]], WikiProject for translating content from non-English Wikipedias * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Languages]], general WikiProject for languages {{#ifeq: {{PAGENAME}} | {{BASEPAGENAME}} | {{template other| [[Category:Interconnected templates]] }} }}

{{interconnected template|[[Template:Expand language/howto/newtopic|Expand language/howto/newtopic]]|[[Template:Expand language/doc|Expand language/doc]]|and about 200 language expand templates|page=template doc helper page}}{{#ifeq:{{#invoke:High-use|num|x|demo={{ROOTPAGENAME}}}}|many||{{High-use|demo={{ROOTPAGENAME}}}}}} {{transclusionless}} This template may be used to mark articles that have counterparts in {{{1}}} Wikipedia that are better than in English Wikipedia. These articles may be improved by [[Wikipedia:Translation|translating content]] from the original {{{1}}}. == Usage == To mark an article, tag it with :{{Expand {{{1}}}|''{{{2|{{{1}}}}}} article title''|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} This template adds articles to the category [[:Category:Articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia]]. See [[#Categorization]] below. The template should be placed atop the article page [[MOS:ORDER|along with other maintenance templates]]. == Parameters == All parameters are optional: * {{!}}1=''ARTICLE''{{snd}}title of the article on {{{1}}} Wikipedia. This defaults to the article linked to the English article via Wikidata. * |section=yes{{snd}}changes notice to "This section may be expanded..." (default: 'article'){{#ifexist: Category:Featured articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia | * |fa=yes{{snd}}used to tag articles that are [[WP:FA|featured articles]] in {{{1}}}; used in category name generation.}} {{#ifexist: Category:Geography articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia | * {{!}}topic=''TOPIC''{{snd}}a topic code used in category name generation.}} * {{!}}date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}{{snd}} set by bot if omitted. == Topics and categorization == This template categorizes articles into categories. Basic categorization is into: ⟶ [[:Category:Articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia]]. Usage of parameters fa and topic define subcategories{{#ifexist: Category:Featured articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia | , as follows: * fa=yes ⟶ [[:Category:Featured articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia]] |.}} {{#ifexist: Category:Geography articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia | Topic codes are expanded into fuller descriptors in the category name; for example: code ''geo'' becomes ''Geography'', and code ''gov'' becomes ''Government and politics''. * topic=geo ⟶ [[:Category:Geography articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia]] Topics recognized by {{BASEPAGENAME}} and the categories they are associated with include: {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|bio}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|culture}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|geo}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|gov}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|hist}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|mil}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|scitech}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|sport}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|struct}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|transp}} {{#ifexist: Template:Expand {{{1}}}/topics | {{Expand {{{1}}}/topics}} |}}
Topic code Topic name
and category		 Articles in
category
  [[:Category:Articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia|Main category]] {{#ifeq: {{PAGESINCATEGORY:Articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|subcats}} | 0 | | ({{PAGESINCATEGORY:Articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|subcats}} C) |}}{{PAGESINCATEGORY:Articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|pages}}
}} === Adding a new topic and subcategory === {{Collapse top|bg=cornsilk|click show to view details on adding new topics and subcategories}} {{Expand language/howto/newtopic|{{{1}}}}} {{Collapse bottom}} == See also == * [[WP:CWW]], policy which governs copying and translating articles from other language Wikipedias * [[WP:TFOLWP]], describes [[WP:COPYRIGHT|required attribution]] when adding translated content to an article * [[Wikipedia:Translation]], general info * [[Help:Translation]], a how-to page about how to copy and translate text from a [[Wikipedia:About#Other_languages|Wikipedia foreign language article]] into English. * [[Wikipedia:Pages needing translation into English]] * {{Template link|Expand language}}, parent template * {{Template link|Translated page}}, may be added to the Talk page to provide supplemental [[WP:TFOLWP|translation attribution]] * {{Template link|Proofreader needed}}, may be added to the article page to request assistance after translation from a given language * [https://randomincategory.toolforge.org/Articles_needing_translation_from_{{{1|German}}}_Wikipedia?site=en.wikipedia.org Random article needing expansion from {{{1|German}}} Wikipedia] * [[:Category:Articles needing translation from {{{1|German}}} Wikipedia]] * [[:Category:Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation from {{{1|German}}}]] * [[:Category:Wikipedia translation templates]] * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Intertranswiki]], WikiProject for translating content from non-English Wikipedias * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Languages]], general WikiProject for languages {{#ifeq: {{PAGENAME}} | {{BASEPAGENAME}} | {{template other| [[Category:Interconnected templates]] }} }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{interconnected template|[[Template:Expand language/howto/newtopic|Expand language/howto/newtopic]]|[[Template:Expand language/doc|Expand language/doc]]|and about 200 language expand templates|page=template doc helper page}}{{#ifeq:{{#invoke:High-use|num|x|demo={{ROOTPAGENAME}}}}|many||{{High-use|demo={{ROOTPAGENAME}}}}}} {{transclusionless}} This template may be used to mark articles that have counterparts in {{{1}}} Wikipedia that are better than in English Wikipedia. These articles may be improved by [[Wikipedia:Translation|translating content]] from the original {{{1}}}. == Usage == To mark an article, tag it with :{{Expand {{{1}}}|''{{{2|{{{1}}}}}} article title''|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} This template adds articles to the category [[:Category:Articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia]]. See [[#Categorization]] below. The template should be placed atop the article page [[MOS:ORDER|along with other maintenance templates]]. == Parameters == All parameters are optional: * {{!}}1=''ARTICLE''{{snd}}title of the article on {{{1}}} Wikipedia. This defaults to the article linked to the English article via Wikidata. * |section=yes{{snd}}changes notice to "This section may be expanded..." (default: 'article'){{#ifexist: Category:Featured articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia | * |fa=yes{{snd}}used to tag articles that are [[WP:FA|featured articles]] in {{{1}}}; used in category name generation.}} {{#ifexist: Category:Geography articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia | * {{!}}topic=''TOPIC''{{snd}}a topic code used in category name generation.}} * {{!}}date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}{{snd}} set by bot if omitted. == Topics and categorization == This template categorizes articles into categories. Basic categorization is into: ⟶ [[:Category:Articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia]]. Usage of parameters fa and topic define subcategories{{#ifexist: Category:Featured articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia | , as follows: * fa=yes ⟶ [[:Category:Featured articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia]] |.}} {{#ifexist: Category:Geography articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia | Topic codes are expanded into fuller descriptors in the category name; for example: code ''geo'' becomes ''Geography'', and code ''gov'' becomes ''Government and politics''. * topic=geo ⟶ [[:Category:Geography articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia]] Topics recognized by {{BASEPAGENAME}} and the categories they are associated with include: {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|bio}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|culture}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|geo}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|gov}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|hist}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|mil}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|scitech}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|sport}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|struct}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|transp}} {{#ifexist: Template:Expand {{{1}}}/topics | {{Expand {{{1}}}/topics}} |}}
Topic code Topic name
and category		 Articles in
category
  [[:Category:Articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia|Main category]] {{#ifeq: {{PAGESINCATEGORY:Articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|subcats}} | 0 | | ({{PAGESINCATEGORY:Articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|subcats}} C) |}}{{PAGESINCATEGORY:Articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|pages}}
}} === Adding a new topic and subcategory === {{Collapse top|bg=cornsilk|click show to view details on adding new topics and subcategories}} {{Expand language/howto/newtopic|{{{1}}}}} {{Collapse bottom}} == See also == * [[WP:CWW]], policy which governs copying and translating articles from other language Wikipedias * [[WP:TFOLWP]], describes [[WP:COPYRIGHT|required attribution]] when adding translated content to an article * [[Wikipedia:Translation]], general info * [[Help:Translation]], a how-to page about how to copy and translate text from a [[Wikipedia:About#Other_languages|Wikipedia foreign language article]] into English. * [[Wikipedia:Pages needing translation into English]] * {{Template link|Expand language}}, parent template * {{Template link|Translated page}}, may be added to the Talk page to provide supplemental [[WP:TFOLWP|translation attribution]] * {{Template link|Proofreader needed}}, may be added to the article page to request assistance after translation from a given language * [https://randomincategory.toolforge.org/Articles_needing_translation_from_{{{1|German}}}_Wikipedia?site=en.wikipedia.org Random article needing expansion from {{{1|German}}} Wikipedia] * [[:Category:Articles needing translation from {{{1|German}}} Wikipedia]] * [[:Category:Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation from {{{1|German}}}]] * [[:Category:Wikipedia translation templates]] * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Intertranswiki]], WikiProject for translating content from non-English Wikipedias * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Languages]], general WikiProject for languages {{#ifeq: {{PAGENAME}} | {{BASEPAGENAME}} | {{template other| [[Category:Interconnected templates]] }} }} [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{interconnected template|[[Template:Expand language/howto/newtopic|Expand language/howto/newtopic]]|[[Template:Expand language/doc|Expand language/doc]]|and about 200 language expand templates|page=template doc helper page}}{{#ifeq:{{#invoke:High-use|num|x|demo={{ROOTPAGENAME}}}}|many||{{High-use|demo={{ROOTPAGENAME}}}}}} {{transclusionless}} This template may be used to mark articles that have counterparts in {{{1}}} Wikipedia that are better than in English Wikipedia. These articles may be improved by [[Wikipedia:Translation|translating content]] from the original {{{1}}}. == Usage == To mark an article, tag it with :{{Expand {{{1}}}|''{{{2|{{{1}}}}}} article title''|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} This template adds articles to the category [[:Category:Articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia]]. See [[#Categorization]] below. The template should be placed atop the article page [[MOS:ORDER|along with other maintenance templates]]. == Parameters == All parameters are optional: * {{!}}1=''ARTICLE''{{snd}}title of the article on {{{1}}} Wikipedia. This defaults to the article linked to the English article via Wikidata. * |section=yes{{snd}}changes notice to "This section may be expanded..." (default: 'article'){{#ifexist: Category:Featured articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia | * |fa=yes{{snd}}used to tag articles that are [[WP:FA|featured articles]] in {{{1}}}; used in category name generation.}} {{#ifexist: Category:Geography articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia | * {{!}}topic=''TOPIC''{{snd}}a topic code used in category name generation.}} * {{!}}date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}{{snd}} set by bot if omitted. == Topics and categorization == This template categorizes articles into categories. Basic categorization is into: ⟶ [[:Category:Articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia]]. Usage of parameters fa and topic define subcategories{{#ifexist: Category:Featured articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia | , as follows: * fa=yes ⟶ [[:Category:Featured articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia]] |.}} {{#ifexist: Category:Geography articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia | Topic codes are expanded into fuller descriptors in the category name; for example: code ''geo'' becomes ''Geography'', and code ''gov'' becomes ''Government and politics''. * topic=geo ⟶ [[:Category:Geography articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia]] Topics recognized by {{BASEPAGENAME}} and the categories they are associated with include: {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|bio}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|culture}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|geo}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|gov}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|hist}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|mil}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|scitech}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|sport}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|struct}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|transp}} {{#ifexist: Template:Expand {{{1}}}/topics | {{Expand {{{1}}}/topics}} |}}
Topic code Topic name
and category		 Articles in
category
  [[:Category:Articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia|Main category]] {{#ifeq: {{PAGESINCATEGORY:Articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|subcats}} | 0 | | ({{PAGESINCATEGORY:Articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|subcats}} C) |}}{{PAGESINCATEGORY:Articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|pages}}
}} === Adding a new topic and subcategory === {{Collapse top|bg=cornsilk|click show to view details on adding new topics and subcategories}} {{Expand language/howto/newtopic|{{{1}}}}} {{Collapse bottom}} == See also == * [[WP:CWW]], policy which governs copying and translating articles from other language Wikipedias * [[WP:TFOLWP]], describes [[WP:COPYRIGHT|required attribution]] when adding translated content to an article * [[Wikipedia:Translation]], general info * [[Help:Translation]], a how-to page about how to copy and translate text from a [[Wikipedia:About#Other_languages|Wikipedia foreign language article]] into English. * [[Wikipedia:Pages needing translation into English]] * {{Template link|Expand language}}, parent template * {{Template link|Translated page}}, may be added to the Talk page to provide supplemental [[WP:TFOLWP|translation attribution]] * {{Template link|Proofreader needed}}, may be added to the article page to request assistance after translation from a given language * [https://randomincategory.toolforge.org/Articles_needing_translation_from_{{{1|German}}}_Wikipedia?site=en.wikipedia.org Random article needing expansion from {{{1|German}}} Wikipedia] * [[:Category:Articles needing translation from {{{1|German}}} Wikipedia]] * [[:Category:Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation from {{{1|German}}}]] * [[:Category:Wikipedia translation templates]] * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Intertranswiki]], WikiProject for translating content from non-English Wikipedias * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Languages]], general WikiProject for languages {{#ifeq: {{PAGENAME}} | {{BASEPAGENAME}} | {{template other| [[Category:Interconnected templates]] }} }}

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{interconnected template|[[Template:Expand language/howto/newtopic|Expand language/howto/newtopic]]|[[Template:Expand language/doc|Expand language/doc]]|and about 200 language expand templates|page=template doc helper page}}{{#ifeq:{{#invoke:High-use|num|x|demo={{ROOTPAGENAME}}}}|many||{{High-use|demo={{ROOTPAGENAME}}}}}} {{transclusionless}} This template may be used to mark articles that have counterparts in {{{1}}} Wikipedia that are better than in English Wikipedia. These articles may be improved by [[Wikipedia:Translation|translating content]] from the original {{{1}}}. == Usage == To mark an article, tag it with :{{Expand {{{1}}}|''{{{2|{{{1}}}}}} article title''|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} This template adds articles to the category [[:Category:Articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia]]. See [[#Categorization]] below. The template should be placed atop the article page [[MOS:ORDER|along with other maintenance templates]]. == Parameters == All parameters are optional: * {{!}}1=''ARTICLE''{{snd}}title of the article on {{{1}}} Wikipedia. This defaults to the article linked to the English article via Wikidata. * |section=yes{{snd}}changes notice to "This section may be expanded..." (default: 'article'){{#ifexist: Category:Featured articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia | * |fa=yes{{snd}}used to tag articles that are [[WP:FA|featured articles]] in {{{1}}}; used in category name generation.}} {{#ifexist: Category:Geography articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia | * {{!}}topic=''TOPIC''{{snd}}a topic code used in category name generation.}} * {{!}}date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}{{snd}} set by bot if omitted. == Topics and categorization == This template categorizes articles into categories. Basic categorization is into: ⟶ [[:Category:Articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia]]. Usage of parameters fa and topic define subcategories{{#ifexist: Category:Featured articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia | , as follows: * fa=yes ⟶ [[:Category:Featured articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia]] |.}} {{#ifexist: Category:Geography articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia | Topic codes are expanded into fuller descriptors in the category name; for example: code ''geo'' becomes ''Geography'', and code ''gov'' becomes ''Government and politics''. * topic=geo ⟶ [[:Category:Geography articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia]] Topics recognized by {{BASEPAGENAME}} and the categories they are associated with include: {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|bio}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|culture}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|geo}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|gov}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|hist}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|mil}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|scitech}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|sport}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|struct}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|transp}} {{#ifexist: Template:Expand {{{1}}}/topics | {{Expand {{{1}}}/topics}} |}}
Topic code Topic name
and category		 Articles in
category
  [[:Category:Articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia|Main category]] {{#ifeq: {{PAGESINCATEGORY:Articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|subcats}} | 0 | | ({{PAGESINCATEGORY:Articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|subcats}} C) |}}{{PAGESINCATEGORY:Articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|pages}}
}} === Adding a new topic and subcategory === {{Collapse top|bg=cornsilk|click show to view details on adding new topics and subcategories}} {{Expand language/howto/newtopic|{{{1}}}}} {{Collapse bottom}} == See also == * [[WP:CWW]], policy which governs copying and translating articles from other language Wikipedias * [[WP:TFOLWP]], describes [[WP:COPYRIGHT|required attribution]] when adding translated content to an article * [[Wikipedia:Translation]], general info * [[Help:Translation]], a how-to page about how to copy and translate text from a [[Wikipedia:About#Other_languages|Wikipedia foreign language article]] into English. * [[Wikipedia:Pages needing translation into English]] * {{Template link|Expand language}}, parent template * {{Template link|Translated page}}, may be added to the Talk page to provide supplemental [[WP:TFOLWP|translation attribution]] * {{Template link|Proofreader needed}}, may be added to the article page to request assistance after translation from a given language * [https://randomincategory.toolforge.org/Articles_needing_translation_from_{{{1|German}}}_Wikipedia?site=en.wikipedia.org Random article needing expansion from {{{1|German}}} Wikipedia] * [[:Category:Articles needing translation from {{{1|German}}} Wikipedia]] * [[:Category:Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation from {{{1|German}}}]] * [[:Category:Wikipedia translation templates]] * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Intertranswiki]], WikiProject for translating content from non-English Wikipedias * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Languages]], general WikiProject for languages {{#ifeq: {{PAGENAME}} | {{BASEPAGENAME}} | {{template other| [[Category:Interconnected templates]] }} }} [[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23410164509|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{interconnected template|[[Template:Expand language/howto/newtopic|Expand language/howto/newtopic]]|[[Template:Expand language/doc|Expand language/doc]]|and about 200 language expand templates|page=template doc helper page}}{{#ifeq:{{#invoke:High-use|num|x|demo={{ROOTPAGENAME}}}}|many||{{High-use|demo={{ROOTPAGENAME}}}}}} {{transclusionless}} This template may be used to mark articles that have counterparts in {{{1}}} Wikipedia that are better than in English Wikipedia. These articles may be improved by [[Wikipedia:Translation|translating content]] from the original {{{1}}}. == Usage == To mark an article, tag it with :{{Expand {{{1}}}|''{{{2|{{{1}}}}}} article title''|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} This template adds articles to the category [[:Category:Articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia]]. See [[#Categorization]] below. The template should be placed atop the article page [[MOS:ORDER|along with other maintenance templates]]. == Parameters == All parameters are optional: * {{!}}1=''ARTICLE''{{snd}}title of the article on {{{1}}} Wikipedia. This defaults to the article linked to the English article via Wikidata. * |section=yes{{snd}}changes notice to "This section may be expanded..." (default: 'article'){{#ifexist: Category:Featured articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia | * |fa=yes{{snd}}used to tag articles that are [[WP:FA|featured articles]] in {{{1}}}; used in category name generation.}} {{#ifexist: Category:Geography articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia | * {{!}}topic=''TOPIC''{{snd}}a topic code used in category name generation.}} * {{!}}date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}{{snd}} set by bot if omitted. == Topics and categorization == This template categorizes articles into categories. Basic categorization is into: ⟶ [[:Category:Articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia]]. Usage of parameters fa and topic define subcategories{{#ifexist: Category:Featured articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia | , as follows: * fa=yes ⟶ [[:Category:Featured articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia]] |.}} {{#ifexist: Category:Geography articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia | Topic codes are expanded into fuller descriptors in the category name; for example: code ''geo'' becomes ''Geography'', and code ''gov'' becomes ''Government and politics''. * topic=geo ⟶ [[:Category:Geography articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia]] Topics recognized by {{BASEPAGENAME}} and the categories they are associated with include: {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|bio}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|culture}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|geo}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|gov}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|hist}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|mil}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|scitech}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|sport}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|struct}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|transp}} {{#ifexist: Template:Expand {{{1}}}/topics | {{Expand {{{1}}}/topics}} |}}
Topic code Topic name
and category		 Articles in
category
  [[:Category:Articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia|Main category]] {{#ifeq: {{PAGESINCATEGORY:Articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|subcats}} | 0 | | ({{PAGESINCATEGORY:Articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|subcats}} C) |}}{{PAGESINCATEGORY:Articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|pages}}
}} === Adding a new topic and subcategory === {{Collapse top|bg=cornsilk|click show to view details on adding new topics and subcategories}} {{Expand language/howto/newtopic|{{{1}}}}} {{Collapse bottom}} == See also == * [[WP:CWW]], policy which governs copying and translating articles from other language Wikipedias * [[WP:TFOLWP]], describes [[WP:COPYRIGHT|required attribution]] when adding translated content to an article * [[Wikipedia:Translation]], general info * [[Help:Translation]], a how-to page about how to copy and translate text from a [[Wikipedia:About#Other_languages|Wikipedia foreign language article]] into English. * [[Wikipedia:Pages needing translation into English]] * {{Template link|Expand language}}, parent template * {{Template link|Translated page}}, may be added to the Talk page to provide supplemental [[WP:TFOLWP|translation attribution]] * {{Template link|Proofreader needed}}, may be added to the article page to request assistance after translation from a given language * [https://randomincategory.toolforge.org/Articles_needing_translation_from_{{{1|German}}}_Wikipedia?site=en.wikipedia.org Random article needing expansion from {{{1|German}}} Wikipedia] * [[:Category:Articles needing translation from {{{1|German}}} Wikipedia]] * [[:Category:Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation from {{{1|German}}}]] * [[:Category:Wikipedia translation templates]] * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Intertranswiki]], WikiProject for translating content from non-English Wikipedias * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Languages]], general WikiProject for languages {{#ifeq: {{PAGENAME}} | {{BASEPAGENAME}} | {{template other| }} }} [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Interconnected templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Expand_language%2Fhowto here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{interconnected template|[[Template:Expand language/howto/newtopic|Expand language/howto/newtopic]]|[[Template:Expand language/doc|Expand language/doc]]|and about 200 language expand templates|page=template doc helper page}}{{#ifeq:{{#invoke:High-use|num|x|demo={{ROOTPAGENAME}}}}|many||{{High-use|demo={{ROOTPAGENAME}}}}}} {{transclusionless}} This template may be used to mark articles that have counterparts in {{{1}}} Wikipedia that are better than in English Wikipedia. These articles may be improved by [[Wikipedia:Translation|translating content]] from the original {{{1}}}. == Usage == To mark an article, tag it with :{{Expand {{{1}}}|''{{{2|{{{1}}}}}} article title''|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} This template adds articles to the category [[:Category:Articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia]]. See [[#Categorization]] below. The template should be placed atop the article page [[MOS:ORDER|along with other maintenance templates]]. == Parameters == All parameters are optional: * {{!}}1=''ARTICLE''{{snd}}title of the article on {{{1}}} Wikipedia. This defaults to the article linked to the English article via Wikidata. * |section=yes{{snd}}changes notice to "This section may be expanded..." (default: 'article'){{#ifexist: Category:Featured articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia | * |fa=yes{{snd}}used to tag articles that are [[WP:FA|featured articles]] in {{{1}}}; used in category name generation.}} {{#ifexist: Category:Geography articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia | * {{!}}topic=''TOPIC''{{snd}}a topic code used in category name generation.}} * {{!}}date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}{{snd}} set by bot if omitted. == Topics and categorization == This template categorizes articles into categories. Basic categorization is into: ⟶ [[:Category:Articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia]]. Usage of parameters fa and topic define subcategories{{#ifexist: Category:Featured articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia | , as follows: * fa=yes ⟶ [[:Category:Featured articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia]] |.}} {{#ifexist: Category:Geography articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia | Topic codes are expanded into fuller descriptors in the category name; for example: code ''geo'' becomes ''Geography'', and code ''gov'' becomes ''Government and politics''. * topic=geo ⟶ [[:Category:Geography articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia]] Topics recognized by {{BASEPAGENAME}} and the categories they are associated with include: {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|bio}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|culture}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|geo}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|gov}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|hist}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|mil}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|scitech}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|sport}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|struct}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|transp}} {{#ifexist: Template:Expand {{{1}}}/topics | {{Expand {{{1}}}/topics}} |}}
Topic code Topic name
and category		 Articles in
category
  [[:Category:Articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia|Main category]] {{#ifeq: {{PAGESINCATEGORY:Articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|subcats}} | 0 | | ({{PAGESINCATEGORY:Articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|subcats}} C) |}}{{PAGESINCATEGORY:Articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|pages}}
}} === Adding a new topic and subcategory === {{Collapse top|bg=cornsilk|click show to view details on adding new topics and subcategories}} {{Expand language/howto/newtopic|{{{1}}}}} {{Collapse bottom}} == See also == * [[WP:CWW]], policy which governs copying and translating articles from other language Wikipedias * [[WP:TFOLWP]], describes [[WP:COPYRIGHT|required attribution]] when adding translated content to an article * [[Wikipedia:Translation]], general info * [[Help:Translation]], a how-to page about how to copy and translate text from a [[Wikipedia:About#Other_languages|Wikipedia foreign language article]] into English. * [[Wikipedia:Pages needing translation into English]] * {{Template link|Expand language}}, parent template * {{Template link|Translated page}}, may be added to the Talk page to provide supplemental [[WP:TFOLWP|translation attribution]] * {{Template link|Proofreader needed}}, may be added to the article page to request assistance after translation from a given language * [https://randomincategory.toolforge.org/Articles_needing_translation_from_{{{1|German}}}_Wikipedia?site=en.wikipedia.org Random article needing expansion from {{{1|German}}} Wikipedia] * [[:Category:Articles needing translation from {{{1|German}}} Wikipedia]] * [[:Category:Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation from {{{1|German}}}]] * [[:Category:Wikipedia translation templates]] * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Intertranswiki]], WikiProject for translating content from non-English Wikipedias * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Languages]], general WikiProject for languages {{#ifeq: {{PAGENAME}} | {{BASEPAGENAME}} | {{template other| }} }} [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Interconnected templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24931715792|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{interconnected template|[[Template:Expand language/howto/newtopic|Expand language/howto/newtopic]]|[[Template:Expand language/doc|Expand language/doc]]|and about 200 language expand templates|page=template doc helper page}}{{#ifeq:{{#invoke:High-use|num|x|demo={{ROOTPAGENAME}}}}|many||{{High-use|demo={{ROOTPAGENAME}}}}}} {{transclusionless}} This template may be used to mark articles that have counterparts in {{{1}}} Wikipedia that are better than in English Wikipedia. These articles may be improved by [[Wikipedia:Translation|translating content]] from the original {{{1}}}. == Usage == To mark an article, tag it with :{{Expand {{{1}}}|''{{{2|{{{1}}}}}} article title''|date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}}} This template adds articles to the category [[:Category:Articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia]]. See [[#Categorization]] below. The template should be placed atop the article page [[MOS:ORDER|along with other maintenance templates]]. == Parameters == All parameters are optional: * {{!}}1=''ARTICLE''{{snd}}title of the article on {{{1}}} Wikipedia. This defaults to the article linked to the English article via Wikidata. * |section=yes{{snd}}changes notice to "This section may be expanded..." (default: 'article'){{#ifexist: Category:Featured articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia | * |fa=yes{{snd}}used to tag articles that are [[WP:FA|featured articles]] in {{{1}}}; used in category name generation.}} {{#ifexist: Category:Geography articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia | * {{!}}topic=''TOPIC''{{snd}}a topic code used in category name generation.}} * {{!}}date={{CURRENTMONTHNAME}} {{CURRENTYEAR}}{{snd}} set by bot if omitted. == Topics and categorization == This template categorizes articles into categories. Basic categorization is into: ⟶ [[:Category:Articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia]]. Usage of parameters fa and topic define subcategories{{#ifexist: Category:Featured articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia | , as follows: * fa=yes ⟶ [[:Category:Featured articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia]] |.}} {{#ifexist: Category:Geography articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia | Topic codes are expanded into fuller descriptors in the category name; for example: code ''geo'' becomes ''Geography'', and code ''gov'' becomes ''Government and politics''. * topic=geo ⟶ [[:Category:Geography articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia]] Topics recognized by {{BASEPAGENAME}} and the categories they are associated with include: {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|bio}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|culture}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|geo}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|gov}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|hist}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|mil}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|scitech}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|sport}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|struct}} {{EL table row|{{{1}}}|transp}} {{#ifexist: Template:Expand {{{1}}}/topics | {{Expand {{{1}}}/topics}} |}}
Topic code Topic name
and category		 Articles in
category
  [[:Category:Articles needing translation from {{{1}}} Wikipedia|Main category]] {{#ifeq: {{PAGESINCATEGORY:Articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|subcats}} | 0 | | ({{PAGESINCATEGORY:Articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|subcats}} C) |}}{{PAGESINCATEGORY:Articles needing translation from {{{1|}}} Wikipedia|pages}}
}} === Adding a new topic and subcategory === {{Collapse top|bg=cornsilk|click show to view details on adding new topics and subcategories}} {{Expand language/howto/newtopic|{{{1}}}}} {{Collapse bottom}} == See also == * [[WP:CWW]], policy which governs copying and translating articles from other language Wikipedias * [[WP:TFOLWP]], describes [[WP:COPYRIGHT|required attribution]] when adding translated content to an article * [[Wikipedia:Translation]], general info * [[Help:Translation]], a how-to page about how to copy and translate text from a [[Wikipedia:About#Other_languages|Wikipedia foreign language article]] into English. * [[Wikipedia:Pages needing translation into English]] * {{Template link|Expand language}}, parent template * {{Template link|Translated page}}, may be added to the Talk page to provide supplemental [[WP:TFOLWP|translation attribution]] * {{Template link|Proofreader needed}}, may be added to the article page to request assistance after translation from a given language * [https://randomincategory.toolforge.org/Articles_needing_translation_from_{{{1|German}}}_Wikipedia?site=en.wikipedia.org Random article needing expansion from {{{1|German}}} Wikipedia] * [[:Category:Articles needing translation from {{{1|German}}} Wikipedia]] * [[:Category:Wikipedia articles needing cleanup after translation from {{{1|German}}}]] * [[:Category:Wikipedia translation templates]] * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Intertranswiki]], WikiProject for translating content from non-English Wikipedias * [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Languages]], general WikiProject for languages {{#ifeq: {{PAGENAME}} | {{BASEPAGENAME}} | {{template other| }} }} [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Interconnected templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
